evals.prompt: Use the database URL in my .env file to chart how many links were created per month over the last year. I need a PNG bar chart with month on X-axis and total links on Y-axis.
evals.expected_output: A PNG file generated from DB data with exactly 12 month buckets and link totals.

evals.prompt: Please query Postgres from .env and create monthly counts from links.created_at for the past 12 months, then export a bar chart image to ./reports/links-year.png.
evals.expected_output: A PNG chart at ./reports/links-year.png and a month/count summary.

evals.prompt: I need a last-12-month links trend chart from our links table. Use DATABASE_URL and include zero-count months in the chart output as a PNG.
evals.expected_output: A PNG chart where all 12 months are represented, including zero-count months.
